final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve historical data and events for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 for May and June 2020.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical data and events for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 for May and June 2020.
#Task2: Analyze the retrieved data to identify any anomalies, alerts, and work orders for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Analysis report on anomalies, alerts, and work orders for Chiller 9.
#Task3: Based on the analysis, determine if a new work order is required for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 in July 2020.
#Agent3: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Recommendation on whether to create a new work order for Chiller 9 in July 2020.
